title: ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING ADDICTION SERVICES - 211info
text: HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referral information to treatment agencies, educational materials, presentations on preventing underage drinking and drug use among youth, and information on treatment options for alcohol, drug, and gambling addictions. 5250 NE Elam Young Parkway Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (503) 846-2288 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-2288 Alternate (503) 846-4528 Support Team INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for referral information or to request an educational presentation FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Hawthorn Farm TriMet MAX stop Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Specialized Information and Referral * Gambling Issues Substance Use Disorder Referrals Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WRAPAROUND CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CIVIL COMMITMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WASHINGTON COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - HAWTHORN WALK-IN CENTER SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - CENTER FOR ADDICTIONS TRIAGE AND TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MENTAL HEALTH REFERRALS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER
